name: a dot-dot project id is rejected so a project overlay write can never traverse out into the official namespaces
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r59-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'sources: []\n' > $OUT/reg.yaml && cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --project '..' 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 2 ] && grep -q "may not be '.' or '..'" e.err && echo dot-dot-project-id-rejected 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
